chunks.title: Command to Send Yoke Message
chunks.reason: Jeremiah receives a specific command to create a yoke and deliver a unified oracle to foreign kings regarding Babylonian dominance.

chunks.title: Address to King Zedekiah
chunks.reason: A direct address to the king urging submission to Babylon and warning against false prophets.

chunks.title: Oracle Against False Prophets and Vessels
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle addressing the priests and people about the false hope of returning vessels and their eventual fate in Babylon.
